scores.notes: The OCR output has some text accuracy issues, such as the company name being partially incorrect ('TANMIX' instead of 'INDAH'). The date is incorrect ('19/03/2018' instead of '19/10/2018'). The table structure is mostly preserved, but the OCR output includes additional details not present in the ground truth. Numeric values are mostly accurate, with a minor discrepancy in the total amount. The layout is generally preserved, but the OCR output contains extra information. Most of the ground truth text is captured, but with some inaccuracies.
